design_archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast (Authority, Clarity) mixed with Developer Terminal aesthetics

typography.headings: Cabinet Grotesk (for marketing/landing moments) or IBM Plex Sans (for application UI)

colors.strategy: Stark structural monochrome with a single, highly visible accent color (Vercel/Raycast style).

visual enhancers.borders: 1px solid crisp borders everywhere. Avoid soft drop shadows. Use inner glow (box-shadow inset) for depth on dark mode.
visual enhancers.glassmorphism: Used ONLY for Command Palette and Sticky Headers. MUST include saturation boost and subtle border. e.g., backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/80.
visual enhancers.code_blocks: Slightly darkened/tinted backgrounds (e.g., bg-[#111] in dark mode) with syntax highlighting colors that meet 4.5:1 contrast.

component name: Shadcn Resizable (for draggable split panes between Input/Output)

grids.home: High Density Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 md:gap-6. Cardless or minimal outline cards for tools.
grids.tool_workspace: Two-pane split layout. h-[calc(100vh-64px)]. flex flex-col lg:flex-row w-full gap-4.

layouts.app_shell: Left Sidebar (w-64) + Right Main Content. Mobile uses hamburger menu to trigger sidebar sheet.
layouts.sidebar: Dense list with category headers. Active states should have subtle bg highlight and an accent left-border indicator.
layouts.command_palette: Centered overlay, max-w-2xl, triggered globally via Cmd+K. Must have a backdrop-blur and semi-opaque background. NO transparent background.
layouts.tool_workspace_header: Flex row, left-aligned title, right-aligned actions (Copy, Download, Clear) inside a toolbar.

motion.transitions: Snappy and precise. Use duration-150 ease-out. BAN transition-all.
motion.hover_states: Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-[2px]) with a shadow. Buttons dim slightly or invert colors.
motion.microinteractions: Copy button should temporarily change icon to a checkmark and scale up slightly when clicked.

accessibility.contrast: Strict adherence to APCA / WCAG AA. Text over backgrounds must be clearly readable.
accessibility.testing_attributes: EVERY interactive element must have data-testid. e.g., data-testid='sidebar-json-formatter', data-testid='copy-btn'.
accessibility.keyboard_navigation: Full support for Tab/Shift+Tab with visible focus-visible ring-2 ring-accent ring-offset-background.
accessibility.shortcuts: Use <kbd> tags visually for shortcuts. e.g., Cmd + K, Cmd + S, Cmd + Enter to format.

media: Use Lucide-React icons for UI elements. Ensure stroke-width is consistent (1.5 or 2).
3d libraries: None required. Keep it flat, fast, and 2D for maximum performance.

image_urls.empty_state: No external images needed for developer utilities. Use typographic empty states or simple SVG icons.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application using React (.js/.jsx files only, NO .tsx).
Implement a robust client-side routing setup react-router-dom.
Ensure theme toggling works by modifying the .dark class on the HTML element.
Integrate 'cmdk' (command palette) accessible from anywhere via keyboard shortcut.
Build a Split Pane view for tools like JSON Formatter (Input on left, Output on right).
All tools must execute synchronously or via Web Workers completely in-browser. Do not mock API calls, implement actual JS logic (JSON.parse, btoa, atob, etc).
Ensure 'Copy to Clipboard' and 'Download File' utility functions are reusable across all tools.
Use Shadcn components but style them strictly to match the high-contrast developer aesthetic described.
DO NOT use transparent backgrounds on dropdowns, select menus, or command palettes.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetic. Create crisp, professional devtools.
Do not use dark colors as gradient backgrounds. Stick to solid monochromes with bright accents.
Do NOT center align the app container. Keep text strictly left-aligned for data/code.
Never use AI assistant Emojis (🤖🧠💡) for icons. Use clean Lucide icons.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (transition: all). Target specific properties.
Customize the scrollbars in index.css to be thin, trackless, and unobtrusive (developer style).
Every button, input, and interactive tool MUST have a data-testid attribute.
Use Sonner for all toast notifications, configured to bottom-right.
